title: cornucopiae involucratum
intro: Cornucopiae involucratum, also known as Horned Poppy or Horned Cabbage, is a plant species that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cornucopiae involucratum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infusion for herbal remedies, and it is also used in homeopathic medicine for its therapeutic properties.
